Off Calendar Oct-03-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Continued To Oct-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Pamela Leggett Cooke for and with Beverly Warren (Administrator).
Mildred Clark in Propria Persona.

Ms. Cooke stated that she e-filed a final accounting, that it was rejected and that she re-submitted it today. Ms. Clark inquired as to whether the Court had received her letter. The Court indicated that it had not received a letter, explained that anything she wants the Court to consider needs to be filed and that the Court could not engage in ex parte communication. Status on close of estate is continued to October 3, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Continued To Aug-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Pamela Cooke for Beverly Warren.
Mildred Clarke (Beneficiary/Heir) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Cooke stated that an inventory and appraisal has been filed, that they only appraised the house, that they had a bank account on hand and that she can file a final inventory and appraisal next week. Ms. Cooke also stated that she will prepare a petition for final distribution, requested a continuance stating that she had several trials, that she had to deal with an issue of a party not vacating the house and that if she is unable to do final distribution, she will file a status report. Status on close of estate is continued to August 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that this matter needs to be given priority and that an inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration must be on file by then.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Receipt For Deposit Of Sales Proceeds Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Receipt For Deposit Of Sales Proceeds Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Continued To Jan-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pamela Cooke for (administrator) Beverly Warren.

The Court sated that it has the receipts for the 2 blocked accounts, Bank of the West and US Bank and asked for status on the remaining $90,000.00. Ms. Cooke stated that there was difficulty in closing escrow, that they reached an agreement with the buyer to handle getting the heir out of the house, that the $90,000.00 is being withheld for the buyers attorney fees and lost rent, that it was to go into her attorney/client trust account but she thinks it should go into the estate account. The Court confirmed that it is security to the buyers for damages suffered and asked about the $2218.00 in attorney's fees that was paid out of escrow. Ms. Cooke stated that it should not have been done, that it was a retainer amount for the first attorney they hired who started the action but then backed out and that the administrator had put in the request for attorney's fees. The Court stated that it is not sure if they need an order from the Court regarding this arrangement with the buyer. The status regarding the filing of receipts for funds into a blocked account was continued to January 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Receipt For Deposit Of Sales Proceeds Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Nov-23-2016 Continued To Dec-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pamela Cooke (via court call) for (administrator) Beverly Warren.

The Court asked if the sale has closed. Ms. Cooke reported that it has, that they have opened one account but need to set up a second account and confirmed that the receipt for the first account has not been filed yet. The status of filing receipts for deposits into a blocked account was continued to December 7, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Receipt For Deposit Of Sales Proceeds Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Continued To Oct-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pamela Leggett Cooke for (administrator) Beverly Warren.

The Court asked for the status of the receipts. Ms. Cooke reported that they have not closed escrow, that one of the heirs is not cooperating and will not vacate the property, that they are in negotiations with the buyer, that if the buyer takes the property the buyer will deal with the unlawful detainer, that the issue is the amount that needs to be held in escrow, that there is a reverse mortgage that is in default and that counsel hopes to be able to speak with the heir at a hearing on October 12, 2016. The status on filing receipts for deposit of sales proceeds into a blocked account was continued to October 26, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

Ex Parte Application For Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Sep-08-2016 Denied

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1435-1437 Quesada Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pamela L. Cooke, for and with petitioner Beverly Warren; Allen Warren; Mildred Clark; Clyde Sanders.

Mr. Sanders stated that he was present to object to the sale as a beneficiary, contending that the property was being sold for $200,000 less than it is worth. The Court stated that the hearing on the petition would determine that. Thepetition sought to sell a 100% interest in the real property located at 1435-37 Quesada Avenue, San Francisco, upon the terms and conditions of the amended report of sale dated July 25, 2016, with a sales price of $750,000.00. The Court declared that this was a qualifying bid. There were no overbidders for the property.

The sale was confirmed at $750,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the amended report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required. The sales proceeds are directed to be deposited into a blocked account. A status hearing re filing of receipt for deposit into blocked account was set for September 14, 2016, at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1435-1437 Quesada Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Continued To Aug-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pamela Cooke for Beverly Warren.

Ms. Cooke stated that they need a continuance, that they have a new buyer and that they will need to file an amended petition. The Court stated that they also need proper posting and an inventory and appraisal. The Report of sale and petition to confirm sale of real property was continued to August 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
